title: NoGhostHit
description: This is made special for boxpvp players.
body:
**NoGhostHit** is designed to enhance combat accuracy by fixing and improving hit registration during gameplay.
Ghost hits can often make fights feel inconsistent and frustrating, especially in fast-paced PvP situations where every click matters. This mod helps ensure that your attacks are properly detected and registered, creating a smoother and more responsive combat experience.

By improving synchronization between hits and server-side detection, NoGhostHit minimizes delayed or ignored attacks, allowing players to experience more consistent damage registration in real time. Whether you are playing competitively or casually, the mod provides a more reliable fighting system that feels cleaner, faster, and more accurate.

The goal of NoGhostHit is not to change the core mechanics of combat, but to optimize the way hits are recognized so players can focus on skill, timing, and movement without dealing with random missed registrations. With improved responsiveness and better combat consistency, PvP becomes more enjoyable, fair, and satisfying overall.
